heading: Employment of individuals with disabilities
label: 1405 Employment of individuals with disabilities
text: The Secretary shall ensure that each recipient of assistance under this chapter makes positive efforts to employ and advance in employment qualified individuals with disabilities in programs assisted under this chapter.
